title: Rosalee Fleming
compiled_truth: Rosalee Fleming is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-25), Rosalee Fleming sent 572 and received 575 emails, totalling 1147 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (33), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (27), [Kay Chapman](people/kay-chapman) (27), [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (26), [Cindy Stark](people/cindy-stark) (26). Mailbox folders observed: _sent, calendar, california, deleted_items, enron_advisonry_council, greenhouse_gas_business.
